title: Shooting Star
description: A modern E-commerce platform for fashion. Featuring a secure login system, dynamic product management, and a seamless shopping experience built with high-performance backend architecture.

title: Figma Design Implementation
description: A high-fidelity front-end project focused on translating complex Figma designs into responsive, pixel-perfect web interfaces. Developed with a focus on modern UI patterns and optimized performance.

title: Employee Attendance Dashboard
description: A comprehensive management tool designed for tracking employee attendance and performance. Developed with complex API integrations and a custom data model to handle real-time workforce monitoring and reporting.

title: Brainwave: Next-Gen AI Platform
description: A cutting-edge UI/UX implementation of a futuristic AI platform design. Focused on complex animations, seamless transitions, and interactive visual elements to deliver a captivating and immersive user experience.

title: Food Wagon: Restaurant & Delivery UI
description: A vibrant and responsive food delivery interface based on a professional Figma design. Features a clean layout, optimized image assets, and a user-centric navigation flow to enhance the digital dining experience.

title: Google Drive UI: Components Architecture
description: A high-fidelity simulation of the Google Drive user interface. Focused on a robust component-based design architecture, complex state management for file sorting, and a clean, familiar user experience.
